high_level_tasks: Decide on the target language and runtime for the pipeline.
Define the minimal end-to-end behavior for the pipeline (inputs, processing, outputs).
Design the main entry point and high-level module structure.
Identify any external dependencies or integrations that may be required.
Specify how configuration will be provided (e.g., environment variables, config file, CLI arguments).
Draft a checklist for successful implementation based on this specification.
Align the testing strategy with the plan in data/testing_plan.md.
constraints: Do not implement any code in this iteration.
All changes must be captured as documentation or planning artifacts.
Future implementation must respect the pipeline state recorded in data/pipeline_state.json.
notes_for_developer_agent: Use this TODO list as guidance when starting the implementation iteration.
Before writing code, refine and, if necessary, extend this TODO list with more granular tasks.
Coordinate changes with the testing plan to ensure all key behaviors will be testable.
